qa_pairs.question: When running GROMACS simulations on whole nodes, what is the general recommendation for configuring `--ntasks-per-node` and `--cpus-per-task`?
qa_pairs.answer: Generally, when running GROMACS simulations on whole nodes, the product of `--ntasks-per-node` and `--cpus-per-task` should match the number of CPU cores on the cluster’s compute nodes.

qa_pairs.question: If GROMACS reports an error regarding domain decomposition being impossible due to system size, what adjustment should be made to the job script parameters?
qa_pairs.answer: If GROMACS reports an error about domain decomposition being impossible given the system size and requested number of domains, you should halve the `--ntasks-per-node` value and double the `--cpus-per-task` value.
